digievolution.selectNode: SELECT A DIGIEVOLUTION NODE FOR MORE DETAILS.

tooltips.strength: Increases the damage dealt by physical attacks and techniques.
tooltips.defense: Reduces the damage taken from physical attacks.
tooltips.spirit: Increases the damage dealt by magical techniques and affects maximum MP.
tooltips.wisdom: Improves magical hit rate, evasion against magic, and reduces damage taken from magical attacks.
tooltips.speed: Determines turn order in battle and improves overall evasion rate.
tooltips.charisma: Increases Digimon popularity, lowers shop prices, and allows battling certain Tamers.
tooltips.fire: Reduces damage taken from Fire-elemental techniques.
tooltips.water: Reduces damage taken from Water-elemental techniques.
tooltips.ice: Reduces damage taken from Ice-elemental techniques.
tooltips.wind: Reduces damage taken from Wind-elemental techniques.
tooltips.thunder: Reduces damage taken from Thunder-elemental techniques.
tooltips.machine: Reduces damage taken from Machine-elemental techniques.
tooltips.dark: Reduces damage taken from Dark-elemental techniques.
